title: Black Diamond Rockwell Quilted Extra Firm Hybrid 16" Mattress

seo.title: Black Diamond Rockwell Extra Firm 16" Hybrid Mattress | LA Mattress
seo.description: Black Diamond Rockwell — 16" extra-firm hybrid with Coolstream fabric, Titanium + 5lb charcoal memory foam, Ice Flex cooling bands, and 9-Series wrapped coils. 20-year warranty. Queen $2,599.

metafields.custom.tagline: Extra-firm luxury hybrid — titanium + charcoal memory foam over a 9-Series coil core.
metafields.custom.lede: The Black Diamond Rockwell is Diamond Mattress's luxury extra-firm hybrid: a 16-inch build with Coolstream fabric on top, high-density titanium memory foam plus Ice Flex cooling bands in the middle, and a 9-Series wrapped coil system anchoring the support. 5-pound high-density charcoal memory foam adds odor control and a denser feel than typical hybrids. 20-year warranty, made in California.
custom.best_for: Back and stomach sleepers who specifically want extra-firm
Heavier shoppers (260 lbs+) who need a stable, non-sinking core
Hot sleepers — three distinct cooling layers stack the deck
Anyone prioritizing long-term durability over short-term softness
custom.not_ideal_for: Side sleepers — the surface is too firm for shoulder relief
Anyone under 140 lbs who'd want a Medium or Plush build instead

custom.highlights.title: 3-layer cooling stack
custom.highlights.body: Coolstream fabric + Ice Flex cooling bands + titanium memory foam — engineered, not a marketing claim.

custom.highlights.title: 9-Series wrapped coil core
custom.highlights.body: More coils per square foot than typical 7-Series hybrids — denser support that doesn't sag.

custom.highlights.title: 5-lb charcoal memory foam
custom.highlights.body: High-density charcoal layer for odor control and longevity.

custom.highlights.title: 16-inch foam-encased build
custom.highlights.body: Tall, dense build engineered to outlast — backed by a 20-year warranty.

description_html:
The Black Diamond Rockwell is a 16-inch extra-firm hybrid mattress at the top of Diamond Mattress's lineup. A luxury build engineered around three distinct cooling systems and a 9-Series individually wrapped coil core, finished with a high-density 5-pound charcoal memory foam layer for longevity and odor control. Backed by Diamond Mattress's 20-year warranty.

What's inside

  • Coolstream Fabric — heat-conductive cover that pulls warmth off the sleep surface immediately on contact.
  • High-Density Titanium Memory Foam — top contour layer infused with titanium for both cooling and faster response than typical memory foam.
  • Ice Flex Cooling Bands — thermal-conductive bands engineered to wick body heat away from the contour layer all night, not just at first contact.
  • High-Density 5-Pound Charcoal Memory Foam — dense, charcoal-infused transition layer for odor control and durability; significantly denser than the standard 3–4 lb foam most hybrids use.
  • 9-Series Individually Wrapped Coil System — denser-than-typical pocketed coil unit for spinal support and motion isolation.
  • Foam-Encased Edge Support — high-density perimeter so the bed is usable corner-to-corner.

Who it's for

Extra firm — a true 10 / 10 on Diamond's scale. That's the build back and stomach sleepers reach for when other hybrids let the hips drop, and the configuration heavier shoppers tend to land on for long-term stability. The three-layer cooling stack (Coolstream + Ice Flex + titanium) is engineered for the kind of hot sleeper who has tried "cooling" mattresses that didn't deliver. Strict side sleepers should look at the Dreamstage 2.0 Arise Luxe Plush instead — an extra-firm surface is too unforgiving at the shoulder.

Sizes & prices

Twin, Twin XL, Full, Queen, King, and California King. Queen from $2,599.

What's included

  • Free white-glove delivery + setup anywhere in Los Angeles on $499+ orders.
  • Free haul-away of your old mattress on every Queen+ delivery.
  • Same-day delivery on orders placed by 4 p.m.
  • 120-night comfort exchange.
  • 20-year Diamond Mattress warranty — claims handled in-house, not through a third-party clearinghouse.
